steps.title: Population after the first two weeks
steps.content:
Initial population is 1,100 bees. For the first two weeks the increase is 120 bees per week.
Population after week 2: $$1100 + 2 \times 120 = 1340$$ bees.

steps.title: Population after week w (>2) and remaining needed
steps.content:
For week w > 2, there are (w-2) additional weeks each adding 180 bees.
Population at end of week w: $$1340 + 180(w-2) = 1340 + 180w - 360 = 980 + 180w$$ bees.
Bees still needed to reach the goal of 2,600: $$2600 - (980 + 180w) = 1620 - 180w$$.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
